examples: The use of the moony imagery functions to heighten the setting, to place emotions and philosophy on the moon.
"Moony" creates a mystic space by using a steam screens with organic variations and interactive butterfly images.
Remus was not an Animagus; he was a werewolf; it was his monthly transformation into a Wolf that earned him the nickname "Moony" and provided the impetus for the others to become Animagi.
It seems that this mournful-moony romantic is dotting the seven seas with his remorse.
He is charming and unpretentious, though he has a penchant for moony gyrations and emotive expressions that tend to appall his critics.
